merged_prs.title: GEM TnP efficiency bugfix in the OfflineDQM
add `fillDescriptions` to several plugins used at HLT (6/N)
Fix assertion failure in ProductRegistry merging

add a unit tests for running `GRun`, `HIon`, `Special` in FULL output mode
Raise ECAL thresholds for beam splashes
